opportunities.title: Retoucher
opportunities.description:
Video Editor

       

JOB DESCRIPTION

Our Global Design team is seeking a Photo Retoucher to join our remote creative team. The ideal candidate will maintain the highest standards of image quality while adhering to brand guidelines and aesthetic requirements.


This role is fully remote and open to candidates based in the United States.


KEY JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Perform high-end photo retouching for luxury fashion editorial content
